# Partial regex matches across an `iota` const block are rejected.
# Splitting only part of an iota sequence is surprising even if values are
# materialised, so users must move the whole block or refactor it manually.

! exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^Kind(A|B)$' -move
stderr 'cannot partially move iota const block'
cmp big.go expected_big.go
! exists small.go

-- big.go --
package p

type Kind int

const (
	KindUnknown Kind = iota
	KindA
	KindB
	KindC
	KindD
)
-- expected_big.go --
package p

type Kind int

const (
	KindUnknown Kind = iota
	KindA
	KindB
	KindC
	KindD
)
